name: tabloupe
description: Firefox tab-group view switcher: save and switch lenses over your tab groups.

scripts.lint:web-ext: web-ext lint --source-dir . --ignore-files node_modules package-lock.json .github web-ext-artifacts build.sh deploy.sh .npmrc .build.lock --warnings-as-errors
scripts.verify: npm run lint:web-ext && npm test && npm run audit

author: enieuwy
